productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Prophecy Black Yellow Short
description: CompositionBlack and yellow shorts made of 100% polyester, with welt pockets, comfortable drawcord elastic waist, embroidered logo on the left and adidas Essentials 3-Stripes along the length of the legsFittingComfortWash careWash using water less than 30degree C heatDo not soakDo not tumble dryDo not bleachDry in shadeFlat dryCool ironWith this ClimaCool enabled shorts, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. Made of polyester, open mesh and replete with ventilation channels, these shorts ensure cool air flows in and heat and sweat flow out, keeping you dry and comfortable, allowing you to perform at your peak in even the most heated competition. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the yellow strips on the sides allow free and flexible movement. The drawstrings on the inside allow you to create a customised Fit, while the deep side pockets can hold your essentials, including an iPod, when you're on the move. The discreet black mesh pattern on the black polyester adds a stylish touch. Pair it with a ClimaCool t-shirt from adidas and achieve maximum performance. Model's statistics1.
